From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This is a list of Xbox One games currently planned or released either at retail or via download.[a] See List of Xbox 360 & Xbox games for Xbox One for Xbox 360 & Xbox running on Xbox One with an emulator.

List

[edit]

There are currently 3113 games on both parts of this list.[b]

  • 0–9
  • A
  • B
  • C
  • D
  • E
  • F
  • G
  • H
  • I
  • J
  • K
  • L
  • (M–Z)

Notes

[edit]
  1. ^ For a chronological list, click the sort button in any of the available region's columns. Games dated November 22, 2013 (North America and Europe) and September 4, 2014 (Japan) are launch titles for the specified regions.
  2. ^ This number is always up to date by this script.
